'''Bardack''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] who was wanted by the [[Republic Security Force/Legends|Republic Security Force]] for suspected smuggling of narcotics in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="BH" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="date">''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' places the events directly after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> he was detained in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Entertainment District]] by a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] named [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], who collected the 3000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] for a live capture, rather than the 1500 credits offered for his [[Death/Legends|death]].
{{Endgame}}

{{Char-stub}}

==Posted bounty==
*'''Wanted Alive:''' Bardack<ref name="BH" />
*'''Alive:''' 3000 Credits<ref name="BH" />
*'''Dead:''' 1500 Credits<ref name="BH" />
*'''Species:''' Klatooinian<ref name="BH" />
*'''Sex:''' Male<ref name="BH" />
*'''Known Affliates:''' Klatooinian street gangs<ref name="BH" />
*'''Last Known Location:''' Coruscant<ref name="BH" />
*'''Brief:''' Suspected of trafficking narcotics in core systems<ref name="BH" />
*'''Originator:''' Republic Security Force<ref name="BH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bardack appeared in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', as minor bounty for the player's character Jango Fett. Since claiming Bardack's bounty is not essential to game progression, the player can approach the bounty in several ways. The player can ignore him entirely, kill him and not claim the bounty, kill him and claim the bounty, or capture him and claim the bounty.

*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
